description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a modern, clean-lined design, surrounded by a rectangular fenced yard. The structure features a prominent brown gable roof with a slight overhang, white and beige exterior walls, and large glass windows that allow ample natural light. The front yard includes a manicured lawn, a blue rectangular swimming pool, and several palm trees, adding a tropical touch. The rear of the property has a paved driveway and a small garden area. The building appears to have a covered porch or veranda at the front, providing a shaded outdoor space. The overall layout is spacious, with clear separation between the living area, garden, and recreational zones.
description: A modern single-story bungalow with a brown gable roof, white and beige walls, large windows, a front porch, and a fenced yard featuring a pool and palm trees.
description_view_0: Side view showing the brown gable roof, white and beige walls, fenced yard, and pool with palm trees.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the porch, large windows, main entrance, and the pool centered in the yard.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the roof's overhang, white wall, and clear view of the pool and garden area.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the driveway, back entrance, and the full extent of the fenced property.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
